requirement.title: REQ-0879
requirement.requirement: The occurence of a cycle violation which requires an enhancement of the signal values of the signal DTR_Obj_TmDelay because no new object data are available until the starting time of the object list Fleyray transmission or because the detection point of time for the data of the object list is earlier for a multiple of system cycles shall be signalized in the signal DTR_SwCycl by the number of system cycles added to the signal values of DTR_Obj_TmDelay.
